data.title: Add SKIPPED_DESIGN_AWAITING filter to sprint-next-batch.sh
data.description:
## Description

Add design:awaiting_import tag-based story filtering to `plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh`, following the existing `SKIPPED_BLOCKED_STORY` pattern.

### Implementation
1. In the Python section where `is_parent_story_blocked()` checks parent story status, add a parallel check for the `design:awaiting_import` tag on parent stories
2. Source the tag constant from `plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/figma-tags.conf` (or hardcode the tag value with a comment referencing the constants file)
3. When a task's parent story has `design:awaiting_import` in its tags array, add the task to a new `skipped_design_awaiting` list
4. Output `SKIPPED_DESIGN_AWAITING: <id>\tdeferred (parent story <story-id> awaiting designer import)` in text mode
5. Include `skipped_design_awaiting` array in JSON output mode (same structure as `skipped_blocked_story`)

### Files to modify
- Edit: `plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh`

## TDD Requirement
After modification, the RED tests from the previous task must PASS (GREEN). Run: `bash tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch-design-filter.sh`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script contains SKIPPED_DESIGN_AWAITING output logic
  Verify: grep -q 'SKIPPED_DESIGN_AWAITING' plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh
- [ ] Script checks design:awaiting_import tag on parent stories
  Verify: grep -q 'awaiting_import\|design:awaiting' plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh
- [ ] JSON output includes skipped_design_awaiting array
  Verify: grep -q 'skipped_design_awaiting' plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh
- [ ] RED test passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch-design-filter.sh
